title: MikroTik RouterBOARD L23UGSR-5HaxD2HaxD, dual-band WiFi6, 4x MMCX, RouterOS L4
description: The new L23UGSR-5HaxD2HaxD is a dual-band WiFi6 upgrade of the popular RB922 DIY router. You can use it to build custom low-cost outdoor access points or CPEs â for your home, office, homelab needs or even to launch your own products, such as smart vending machines or ticket stations! Thousands of people across the globe choose the RouterBOARD series to build their products because MikroTik offers no subscriptions, no paywalls, no weird licensing or royalty deals... You buy it â you own it! The RouterBOARD L23UGSR-5HaxD2HaxD is equipped with 1x1G ETH port, 2.5G SFP port and a USB port. For antenna connections, there are 4x MMCX connectors placed on the RouterBOARD. It also includes a free miniPCIe slot with a SIM slot for deploying an LTE modem or LoRA card, allowing you to create backup mobile connectivity or an IoT gateway
